exportDescription: Export all your data including images and audio to a selected folder.
importDescription: Import data from a selected folder. You can choose to overwrite everything (Restore) or merge with existing data.
restoreDescription: Wipes all existing data and replaces it with the backup.
mergeDescription: Adds new data. Conflicts are skipped and reported.
conflictsDescription: The following records already exist and were NOT imported. You can download this list as JSON.
categorizedExportDescription: Export specific categories of data. Select a category below to export all items in that category.
categorizedImportDescription: Import a specific category export. Choose how to handle data conflicts.
noItemsFound: No items found in this category.
backupFolderNotice: Important: The export creates a folder named '{{folderName}}'. During import, this folder must be present in the selected directory for the data to be recognized.
folderNotFound: The required folder '{{folderName}}' was not found in the selected directory.
